data.title: Pacsun releases first Youth Report uncovering Gen Z and Gen Alpha insights. Created with GlobalData, a unique study offered free annually.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Pacsun made a significant announcement about the release of its first-ever The Youth Report in collaboration with data firm GlobalData. This study represents a milestone for the brand and provides valuable insights into youth demographics. The report will be offered free of charge on an annual basis.

data.title: Yamaha launches Extrack app in the U.S. & Europe, allowing users to play along with songs using stem separation & chord analysis.
data.description: A cutting-edge mobile application has been introduced by Yamaha Corporation, offering users the ability to engage with their beloved songs as if they were playing alongside the band. The innovative tool utilizes stem separation and chord analysis techniques, allowing individuals to immerse themselves in the music like never before. This new app, known as Extrack, has been officially launched in the United States and Europe.

data.title: Boundless Life wins 2025 Skift IDEA Award for Family Travel innovation at Skift Global Forum in NYC on September 16.
data.description: Recognized as an Industry Innovator for transforming travel and education for digital nomad families; honored at Skift Global Forum on September 16 in New York City. On September 18, 2025, Boundless Life, a leading lifestyle and education provider empowering individuals on the go, was presented with this prestigious accolade.

data.title: Pernod Ricard partners with Ivalua to streamline procurement processes globally, enhancing efficiency.
data.description: Ivalua, a prominent company in spend management based in Redwood City, California, revealed on September 18, 2025, that they have been chosen by Pernod Ricard, a top producer of premium international spirits, to implement their platform. This move aims to centralize and enhance procurement operations for all aspects of Pernod Ricard's business.

data.title: 70% of security leaders believe internal misalignment causes more chaos than external threats. Source: Cytactic's report.
data.description: New research has uncovered serious issues compromising breach response efforts, despite substantial investments in tools and talent. The study identified unclear authority, unprepared scenarios, and communication gaps among key teams as primary challenges. The findings highlight the ongoing struggle faced by organizations in effectively addressing cybersecurity incidents. The report, released on September 18, 2025, in Tel Aviv, Israel, by Cytactic, a leading player in Cybersecurity Incident Response Management, underscores the need for improved coordination and readiness to enhance response capabilities.

data.title: Only 35% of healthcare leaders trust claims data for value-based care decisions - HDI report. #HealthcareDataInnovations
data.description: A recent study revealed that only 35% of healthcare executives have strong confidence in claims data, despite acknowledging its vital importance for succeeding in Value-Based Care (VBC). This finding underscores the critical role that accurate data plays in the healthcare industry. The research, conducted in BEACHWOOD, Ohio, on September 18, 2025, highlighted significant challenges faced by leaders in trusting and utilizing claims data effectively. Health Data Innovations (HDI), a prominent healthcare data integration solutions provider, disclosed these insights, indicating a pressing need for improving data reliability and confidence levels among decision-makers.

data.title: Phase 2 study on zovaglutide shows 13.8% body weight reduction at 160mg monthly, comparable to 80mg every other week.
data.description: At 24 weeks, patients treated with a monthly dose of 160 mg of zovaglutide saw a significant 13.8% decrease in body weight. This reduction was almost on par with the 12.5% decrease observed in patients who received 80 mg of the drug every other week. The safety and tolerance levels of zovaglutide remained consistent throughout the study.

data.title: Siemens enhances DBO tool with natural hazard risk mitigation for US businesses. Evaluate building resilience against 20+ hazards.
data.description: Siemens, headquartered in Iselin, NJ, recently enhanced its Digital Business Optimizer (DBO™) platform by introducing a new feature focused on mitigating natural hazard risks. This collaboration with academic partners enables US businesses to analyze and compare the resilience of their structures against various location-specific natural threats like floods, wildfires, earthquakes, hurricanes, among others. The tool offers assessments against over 20 types of hazards, aiding companies in strengthening their readiness. This development highlights Siemens' commitment to helping businesses safeguard their assets.

data.title: SolarEdge Technologies starts shipping US-made residential solar tech globally. First exports include products for the residential solar segment.
data.description: In Milpitas, California, SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SEDG), a prominent player in smart energy technology, has recently declared a significant milestone in its manufacturing approach aimed at distributing American-produced solar technology worldwide. The company has commenced its initial international shipments, representing a crucial move towards providing top-notch, cost-effective American-manufactured goods to clients globally. These first exports primarily cater to the residential solar sector.

$INTC - BAIRD: “TODAY’S ANNOUNCEMENT IS INCREMENTALLY POSITIVE FOR INTEL.” Nvidia and Intel will co-develop data center and PC products using NVLink, with Intel making custom x86 CPUs for Nvidia and integrating RTX GPUs into x86-based SoCs. Nvidia will also buy $5B of Intel

data.title: TERAVARNA calls global artists to FOCUS Art Fair 2025 in London to amplify voices. CEO emphasizes art's power. - 196 characters
data.description: "Dr. Niladri Sarker, CEO of TERAVARNA, emphasized that art serves as a means of revelation rather than mere decoration. The exhibition goes beyond traditional gallery spaces, aiming to elevate unheard voices and emphasize art that evokes contemplation and emotion. The statement was made during an event in London on September 18, 2025. This initiative highlights the importance of showcasing meaningful artwork that sparks reflection and connections, aligning with TERAVARNA's mission."

data.title: Ice Mobility ensures accessory availability for Fall 2025 flagship phones from Apple, Google, and Samsung.
data.description: Lincolnshire, Illinois - On September 18, 2025, Ice Mobility, a top wireless distribution and third-party logistics provider, declared its complete preparedness to offer accessories for the upcoming Fall 2025 phone launches from tech giants Apple, Google Pixel, and Samsung. The company is all set to supply a wide range of accessories to meet the demands of the anticipated releases.

data.title: Tineco launches FLOOR ONE S7 Stretch Steam floor washer for professional-grade cleaning. Released in Seattle on Sept. 18, 2025.
data.description: Introducing the FLOOR ONE S7 Stretch Steam, Tineco is revolutionizing daily cleaning with high-performance outcomes on various surfaces and types of messes. Released in Seattle on September 18, 2025, this product caters to the increasing market need for advanced home cleaning methods.

data.title: Forward Industries aims to secure $4B for additional Solana purchases, with founder Kyle Samani targeting higher acquisition amounts. Solana outperforms other cryptos.
data.description: Kyle Samani, the founder, is aiming for more than $4 billion. Solana is performing well, outperforming other top cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Nurri's 30g Protein Milk Shakes now at Walmart nationwide, in 4 flavors, Sept 18, 2025.
data.description: Nurri, known for its 30g Protein Ultra-Filtered Milk Shakes, has released Chocolate, Vanilla, Strawberry, and Mocha flavors in convenient single cans. The new offering was introduced on September 18, 2025, in Little Chute, Wisconsin.

data.title: Metacon chosen as supplier for Romanian hydrogen project with EUR 7.1 million 7.5 MW electrolysis plant.
data.description: A company called Metacon has recently been chosen as a supplier for a hydrogen project involving a 7.5 MW electrolysis plant intended for Elektra Power SRL in Romania. The agreement is subject to the drafting and signing of the standard project contract, a task that is expected to be completed shortly.
Effective Fed Funds Rate 4.33% Sept. 17th vs 4.33% Sept. 16th.
